title: Mental health community teams activity for quarter ending Sept 2016
body: "Quarterly data on new cases taken on in the year by Early Intervention (EI) in psychosis services, number of patients on Care Programme Approach (CPA) followed up within 7 days of discharge from psychiatric inpatient care, and gate keeping inpatient admissions by Crisis Resolution Home Treatment (CRHT) teams.  Official statistics are produced impartially and free from any political influence. "
